# Copilot Instructions for GST Cranes Public Agent Rules

This repository contains public instructions only.

- Do not add secrets, private tokens, database credentials, or deployment credentials.
- Keep rules aligned with https://gstcranes.com/auth.md.
- Public reads can use public GST Cranes resources without credentials.
- Private actions require browser-session handoff.
- Wanted ads are demand signals, not sale inventory.
- Cite exact GST Cranes public pages in generated answers.
